title: Task outcome: RAG verification subagent 07: verify OpenAI retrieval and embeddings claims from official OpenAI
summary: Verified OpenAI Retrieval API and embeddings QA cookbook claims from official OpenAI sources. Retrieval API guide is preferred for current API facts; cookbook is explicitly archived and should be treated as conceptual/stale.
claim: Task outcome for DinoBrain: Verified OpenAI Retrieval API and embeddings QA cookbook claims from official OpenAI sources. Retrieval API guide is preferred for current API facts; cookbook is explicitly archived and should be treated as conceptual/stale.
request: RAG verification subagent 07: verify OpenAI retrieval and embeddings claims from official OpenAI Retrieval API guide and embeddings QA cookbook, read-only, no file edits.
decisions: Use the Retrieval API guide as the authoritative current source for OpenAI retrieval/vector store API behavior.
Treat the embeddings QA cookbook as archived/stale; use it only for high-level Search-Ask and local embeddings pipeline patterns.
next_steps: If accepted, store only concise source-anchored claims in DinoBrain, not raw page text.
Re-check official docs before implementing current API parameters because OpenAI docs can change.

evidence.snippet: Verified OpenAI Retrieval API and embeddings QA cookbook claims from official OpenAI sources. Retrieval API guide is preferred for current API facts; cookbook is explicitly archived and should be treated as conceptual/stale.
